_note: bd list does not publish a --json-schema (gc bd list --json-schema returns json_supported=false). The shape below was captured empirically from `gc bd list --limit 1 --json` on 2026-05-19 by reading top-level object keys. This is NOT an authoritative schema — Phase 2 should either commit a hand-pinned reference here or push a follow-up to bd to publish one.
